payload.answer: I saved the user’s request to remember the malformed article reference and its stated usefulness for memory architecture, but could not extract article content because the mock fetch returned a 404 network error.
citations: Input: "Remember this article - https -//examplecom/missing why - useful for memory architecture"

entity_resolution.reason: The provided article reference is malformed and the mock fetch failed with a 404 network error, so article contents could not be verified or extracted.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember an article at the malformed URL-like string "https -//examplecom/missing".
The user indicated the article would be useful for memory architecture.
A mock fetch attempt for the requested article resulted in a 404 network error.

details: Committed only the user-provided article reference and stated reason.
Did not infer or store any article claims because the fetch failed.
Recorded the 404 network error as fetch status.

repair_options: Provide a corrected URL for the article.
Provide a title, author, or publication details to help identify the article.
